issue_title: JsonPointer should not consider "00" to be valid index
issue_description: Although 00 can be parsed as 0 in some cases, it is not a valid JSON number; and is also not legal numeric index for JSON Pointer. As such, JsonPointer class should ensure it can only match property name "00" and not array index.
